projects.title: TaskaTask
projects.description: A cross-platform task management app built with React Native and Expo, featuring Redux Toolkit with entity adapters for efficient state management.

projects.title: Admin Dashboard
projects.description: A comprehensive admin panel built with Next.js featuring real-time data visualization, user management, and role-based access control.

projects.title: Real-time Messaging System
projects.description: A real-time complaint and messaging system with live notifications, message threading, and admin review workflows.
